testimonials.name: Marie L.
testimonials.text: I wanted to test EKHO on one video before going further. The result in Spanish was so impressive that I did three more videos that same week. It sounds completely natural — you'd never know it was an adaptation.

testimonials.name: Thomas R.
testimonials.text: I used EKHO to see what my ad would look like in English before committing to a foreign market. Honestly, it convinced me. Since then I've been building out my brand's internationalization with a lot more confidence.

testimonials.name: Sofia M.
testimonials.text: What surprised me was the speed. I sent my video Monday morning and had the adapted version by Tuesday. The voice really sounds like me. My German clients didn't notice a thing — to them, I'm the one speaking.

services.seoDesc: Discover the EKHO process in 3 steps: share, we adapt, you deploy. Simple, fast, effective.
services.heroSub: A simple 3-step process to transform your videos and reach new markets.
services.diffTitle: EKHO isn't a translation tool. It's an adaptation studio.
services.diffSub: We don't just translate words. We adapt your message so it resonates in a new culture, with the same force and authenticity.
services.diffTagline: Your message intact — your impact, multiplied.

steps.title: You share
steps.desc: Send us your video and target languages. We analyze the content and send you a quote within 24h. Simple, fast, transparent.

steps.title: We adapt
steps.desc: AI accelerates translation and synchronization. Our experts refine every detail to ensure fidelity to your original message.
steps.highlight: AI accelerates the process. Our experts guarantee the quality.

steps.title: You deploy
steps.desc: Your adapted video is delivered in under 48h, ready to publish on your channels. New market, new audience, new revenue.

pricing.seoDesc: Discover our transparent, flexible pricing. Starter at €149, Pro at €349, or custom for specific needs.
pricing.heroSub: No surprises, no hidden fees. Just clear pricing for measurable results.
pricing.footnote: Our pricing is provided as an estimate. Each project is unique — only a quote issued after discussion will serve as the contractual basis.

about.seoTitle: Unlocking the True Potential of Your Content — EKHO Studio
about.seoDesc: Your content is an asset. Don't let it become passive. EKHO transforms your existing assets into multilingual versions.
about.heroTitle: Unlocking the true potential of your content

blocks.title:
Your content is an asset.
Don't let it go passive.
blocks.body: You've invested time, money, and considerable energy into creating your content. Your videos, podcasts, and campaigns have already proven their value in your market. Yet once published, their potential stops at linguistic borders. You're leaving a massive audience asleep.

blocks.title:
The race for visibility shouldn't
be an endless restart.
blocks.body: While you exhaust yourself producing more to stay "trendy", your international competitors are already scaling their successes. The result? Your growth stays linear when it could be exponential.

blocks.title:
That's where EKHO comes in —
without starting from scratch.
blocks.body: We transform your existing assets into multilingual versions. We use AI for power and our experts for precision, guaranteeing a natural result, faithful to your voice and tone. You keep the authenticity of your message — we give it global reach.
